perturbation.original_text: Horst Entertainment agrees to pay Galactcomm $0.01 (one cent) per access up to 400,000 accesses thereafter payment shall be $0.005 (one-half cent) per access. Horst Entertainment shall send this amount to Galacticomm by no later than Wednesday for accesses used from the previuos week (Monday thru Sunday).
perturbation.changed_text: Horst Entertainment agrees to pay Galactcomm $0.01 (one cent) per access up to 400,000 accesses thereafter payment shall be $0.005 (one-half cent) per access. Horst Entertainment shall send this amount to Galacticomm by no later than Wednesday for accesses used from the previuos week (Monday thru Sunday). However, an extension until Friday will be granted, if Horst Entertainment has proof, that they have initiated a wire transfer to Galacticomm's bank account.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces a contradiction by initially stating payment is due Wednesday, but then providing an extension until Friday if wire transfer has been initiated. This creates uncertainty about the actual payment deadline. This contradicts the explicit deadline initially set within the same paragraph.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Horst Entertainment agrees to pay Galactcomm $0.01 (one cent) per access up to 400,000 accesses thereafter payment shall be $0.005 (one-half cent) per access. Horst Entertainment shall send this amount to Galacticomm by no later than Wednesday for accesses used from the previuos week (Monday thru Sunday). However, an extension until Friday will be granted, if Horst Entertainment has proof, that they have initiated a wire transfer to Galacticomm's bank account.
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces an inconsistency regarding the payment deadline. Initially, the text states that payment is due by Wednesday. However, the modification introduces an extension until Friday if a wire transfer has been initiated. This directly contradicts the original Wednesday deadline within the same paragraph, creating a conflict and uncertainty as described in the definition of 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction'. The contradictory text is in the same location.

perturbation.original_text: Galacticomm must provide a person(s) to correct any technical problems (Server being down or inaccessible) 24 hours per day, 7 days per week. This person(s) must be available by beeper or telephone.
perturbation.changed_text: Galacticomm must provide a person(s) to correct any technical problems (Server being down or inaccessible) during normal business hours, Monday through Friday, 9 AM to 5 PM. For after-hours support, reasonable efforts will be made, but response times cannot be guaranteed. This person(s) must be available by beeper or telephone.
perturbation.explanation: The modification introduces a contradiction by initially promising 24/7 support, then restricting it to normal business hours. The phrase 'reasonable efforts' creates ambiguity and contradicts the initial guarantee of round-the-clock availability. This creates an in-text contradiction within the same paragraph.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Galacticomm must provide a person(s) to correct any technical problems (Server being down or inaccessible) during normal business hours, Monday through Friday, 9 AM to 5 PM. For after-hours support, reasonable efforts will be made, but response times cannot be guaranteed. This person(s) must be available by beeper or telephone.
perturbation.justification: The original text requires Galacticomm to provide support 24/7. The changed text limits this support to business hours and offers only 'reasonable efforts' for after-hours support, explicitly stating that response times cannot be guaranteed. This directly contradicts the original 24/7 support obligation, creating a clear inconsistency within the same paragraph and section. The contradicted text is identical to the changed text, further reinforcing that the modification itself introduces the contradiction by narrowing the scope of support and introducing ambiguity.
